log.message: Namaste Bharat Provisions Store! Representing Noida Kirana Cartel (4 stores pooled). We are ready to place a joint bulk order for 350 units of Basmati Rice. Your catalog price is ₹65/unit. Given this aggregated demand, we are looking for a contract price of ₹51/unit.
Hello Cartel! 350 units is a substantial volume. We cannot do ₹51, but we can offer a special syndicate contract rate of ₹61/unit.
Understood. Since the Syndicate pays instantly via Paytm QR Soundbox Transfer, we can split the difference. Let's settle at ₹56/unit for this entire pooled order.
Deal! ₹56/unit is locked. Please approve the checkout link to release dispatch of pooled items.

Hello ITC Direct Distribution, our store's Ashirvaad Atta inventory is critical (18 units). We are placing a restock order of 90 units. Standard catalog price is ₹32/unit. Can you offer bulk discount of ₹29/unit?
Hello! For 90 units, we cannot offer ₹29. Best we can offer is ₹31/unit.
We pay instantly. Let's split the difference and settle at ₹30/unit.
Deal! ₹30/unit is locked. Please approve the checkout link to release dispatch of pooled items.

Namaste Unilever Wholesale Hub! Representing Noida Kirana Cartel (4 stores pooled). We are ready to place a joint bulk order for 345 units of Surf Excel. Your catalog price is ₹110/unit. Given this aggregated demand, we are looking for a contract price of ₹86/unit.
Hello Cartel! 345 units is a substantial volume. We cannot do ₹86, but we can offer a special syndicate contract rate of ₹103/unit.
Understood. Since the Syndicate pays instantly via Paytm QR Soundbox Transfer, we can split the difference. Let's settle at ₹95/unit for this entire pooled order.
Deal! ₹95/unit is locked. Please approve the checkout link to release dispatch of pooled items.

log.message: Namaste Hindustan Oil Depo! Representing Noida Kirana Cartel (4 stores pooled). We are ready to place a joint bulk order for 360 units of Fortune Mustard Oil. Your catalog price is ₹130/unit. Given this aggregated demand, we are looking for a contract price of ₹101/unit.
Hello Cartel! 360 units is a substantial volume. We cannot do ₹101, but we can offer a special syndicate contract rate of ₹122/unit.
Understood. Since the Syndicate pays instantly via Paytm QR Soundbox Transfer, we can split the difference. Let's settle at ₹112/unit for this entire pooled order.
Deal! ₹112/unit is locked. Please approve the checkout link to release dispatch of pooled items.

log.message: Namaste Bharat Provisions Store! Representing Noida Kirana Cartel (4 stores pooled). We are ready to place a joint bulk order for 350 units of Basmati Rice. Your catalog price is ₹65/unit. Given this aggregated demand, we are looking for a contract price of ₹51/unit.

Namaste Hindustan Oil Depo! Representing Noida Kirana Cartel (4 stores pooled). We are ready to place a joint bulk order for 360 units of Fortune Mustard Oil. Your catalog price is ₹130/unit. Given this aggregated demand, we are looking for a contract price of ₹101/unit.

Namaste Aggarwal Wholesale Distributors! Representing Noida Kirana Cartel (4 stores pooled). We are ready to place a joint bulk order for 320 units of Sugar. Your catalog price is ₹34/unit. Given this aggregated demand, we are looking for a contract price of ₹27/unit.

Namaste Unilever Wholesale Hub! Representing Noida Kirana Cartel (4 stores pooled). We are ready to place a joint bulk order for 345 units of Surf Excel. Your catalog price is ₹110/unit. Given this aggregated demand, we are looking for a contract price of ₹86/unit.
Hello Cartel! 345 units is a substantial volume. We cannot do ₹86, but we can offer a special syndicate contract rate of ₹103/unit.
Understood. Since the Syndicate pays instantly via Paytm QR Soundbox Transfer, we can split the difference. Let's settle at ₹95/unit for this entire pooled order.
Deal! ₹95/unit is locked. Please approve the checkout link to release dispatch of pooled items.
